name: T Stamp Inc
summary: T Stamp Inc. (Trust Stamp) develops and markets AI-powered identity authentication software for enterprise, government, and peer-to-peer markets. Products leverage machine learning, computer vision, cryptography, and data mining to detect fraud, protect sensitive data, and enable digital identity verification. Key offerings include biometric authentication, liveness detection, information tokenization, presentation attack detection, and the Orchestration Layer platform, serving financial services, government, and inclusion markets globally.
